name: pair-program-tool
description: Two teammates pair-program a new wrapper tool. Teammate A designs the API and test, teammate B implements, and A reviews. Both must commit and coordinate via peer-DM.
lead_prompt_template: Implement a new wrapper MCP tool `mcp_anyteam_grep` that takes a regex and a directory and returns line-matched results. {assigned_to_a} designs the API surface and writes the test; {assigned_to_b} implements. Both must commit on the same branch. Use peer-DM, not lead pivot, to coordinate.
